transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block recasts reward as temporary relief from a self-renewing urge, then links preference to conditioning and failed restriction; relatable examples help, but sweeping physiological and naturalistic claims weaken credibility.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block recasts reward as temporary relief from a self-renewing urge, then links preference to conditioning and failed restriction; relatable examples help, but sweeping physiological and naturalistic claims weaken credibility.

parsed.generic_mechanism: When interventions use the same causal model, examples, sequencing, and freedom framing, they create equivalent belief-change pressure; comparative advantage requires a substantive difference in at least one of those levers.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: The block recasts reward as temporary relief from a self-renewing urge, then links preference to conditioning and failed restriction; relatable examples help, but sweeping physiological and naturalistic claims weaken credibility.
